description_long: This is a pair of robust, black leather boots designed for urban use, featuring a high-ankle cut for added support and protection. The boots have a matte finish with visible grain texture, reinforced toe caps, and thick, lugged rubber soles for enhanced grip on various surfaces. The lacing system uses metal eyelets and standard criss-cross laces, providing a secure fit. At the back, each boot is equipped with two metallic pull rings, likely for ease of wearing and removal. The overall construction appears sturdy, with double-stitched seams and a padded collar for comfort. The boots are in pristine, new condition with no visible signs of wear or branding.
description: A pair of sturdy, black high-ankle boots with criss-cross laces, metal eyelets, and thick lugged soles, designed for urban environments. The boots have a matte leather finish and metallic pull rings at the back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded toe caps, criss-cross lacing, and high-ankle design.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the textured leather surface, thick sole, and metal eyelets for the laces.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the dual metallic pull rings on each boot and the padded collar.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the boot's profile, sole tread, and lacing system.
